name: exchange-online-shared-mailbox-storage-audit
title: Exchange Online Shared Mailbox Storage Audit (Threshold-Based Reporting Script)
shortDescription: This script connects to Exchange Online, identifies shared mailboxes over a size threshold, and exports a CSV report for governance and capacity monitoring.
longDescription: Audits shared mailbox storage growth by scanning all shared mailboxes, calculating mailbox size in GB, and reporting only entries that exceed the configured threshold.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample Exchange Online Shared Mailbox Storage Audit

references.name: Exchange Online PowerShell module
references.description: Learn how to connect to Exchange Online and use Exchange Online PowerShell cmdlets.
